scripts.test:cli: pnpm run build:repo && vitest run src/cli-command.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:notion-local: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=notion-image-local-to-local vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:yuque-local: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=yuque-image-local-to-local vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:yuque-r2-local: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=yuque-image-r2-to-local vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:yuque-token-local: pnpm run build:repo && ELOG_E2E_CASE=yuque-token-image-local-to-local vitest run src/sync-matrix.e2e.test.ts
